action.reasoning: Observation: test/predict files truncated causing crashes (NameError/TypeError/exit 134 segfault); v22 heuristic reaches human (detector>0, min_d~1.1 best epi) but avg safe~0-12 (max streak 63<<500), success=0, avg_dist~5.6m, low found_rate. Config thresholds exact (500 accum steps in [1,2)m + |angle|<0.2618rad). Analysis: compass always available but dynamic oracle + obstacles cause drift/OA interference/velocity mismatch (human~0.25m/s); follow mode not stable enough for accumulation. Earlier v4-v5 hit ~50-100 safe; literature heuristic can hit ~0.5 follow-rate. Root cause: incomplete code + imperfect gains/OA gating/speed-match. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py+predict.py with clean v23 HeuristicPolicy (follow trigger on detector>0.05|dist<3.5, base_vel=0.25+0.08*err clipped[0.15,0.4], pure-rotate if |angle|>0.26, strong -7*angle, OA gated by detector<0.25+min_front<0.85 with improved valid depth masks+left/right/center, backup<0.85, seek when far, per-step accum safe+streak/max_streak using compass+exact config angle, robust metrics collision/dict handling, one Env with resets, full JSON contract+make_serializable+all keys+manual safe>=500 for success). Update train.py to v23. Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for validation (target >100 safe in good epis, first >500).
